artifact_reviewed: Chapter analysis pipeline: Chs 1 (Feklyunina) + 2 (Morozov) review workbench
evidence_basis: The package can capture argument and revision structure, but manuscript quality still requires close editorial execution.
review_decision: Accept as executable review evidence; do not promote to full operational standing until the remaining gap is closed.
claim_boundary: Executed review trace for a local review workbench; not full production readiness or external validation.
